# ShipCalcWize

> International Shipping Cost Calculator & Comparison

Compare international shipping costs, transit times, and carriers. Free calculator for air freight, ocean freight, and express shipping rates worldwide.

## Core pages
- [Methodology and data sources](https://shipcalcwize.com/methodology/): how every figure is derived, with primary-source citations
- [About and editorial standards](https://shipcalcwize.com/about/): authorship and review policy

## Key country
- [Shipping Cost Inflation 2026](https://shipcalcwize.com/insights/shipping-cost-inflation-2026/)
- [Cheapest Shipping Methods](https://shipcalcwize.com/insights/cheapest-shipping-methods/)
- [Shipping Zones Explained](https://shipcalcwize.com/insights/shipping-zones-explained/)
- [Afghanistan](https://shipcalcwize.com/country/afghanistan/)
- [Albania](https://shipcalcwize.com/country/albania/)
- [Algeria](https://shipcalcwize.com/country/algeria/)
- [Andorra](https://shipcalcwize.com/country/andorra/)
- [Angola](https://shipcalcwize.com/country/angola/)
- [Argentina](https://shipcalcwize.com/country/argentina/)
- [Armenia](https://shipcalcwize.com/country/armenia/)
- [Australia](https://shipcalcwize.com/country/australia/)
- [Austria](https://shipcalcwize.com/country/austria/)

## Data
- Primary sources: Freightos Baltic Index (FBX), World Bank — Logistics Performance Index, UNCTAD — Review of Maritime Transport, World Customs Organization (WCO HS)
- All figures are derived from these primary sources; see /methodology/ for derivation and vintage.
